meta.name: Submit Agent — Target Sites
meta.description: Curated list of directories and platforms for AI product submissions.

sites.name: Medium
sites.notes: 发布高质量内容获取外链

sites.name: Issuu
sites.notes: 文档分享平台,上传融资路演 PPT、产品指南等,在描述中添加官网链接

sites.name: Behance
sites.notes: 设计作品集平台,创建作品集展示产品设计

sites.name: Crunchbase
sites.notes: 创建免费账户,添加组织资料,完整填写融资信息、创始人、公司描述和官网网址,网站字段传递 dofollow 链接

sites.name: Product Hunt
sites.notes: 在平台上发布产品,获取高质量外链

sites.name: G2
sites.notes: 提交公司产品评论和资料

sites.name: Disqus
sites.notes: 评论系统,用真实姓名和网站完善资料参与讨论

sites.name: Provenexpert
sites.notes: dofollow 反向链接 在provenexpert上创建一个帐户，完善公司信息，并将您的网站添加到个人资料中。

sites.name: AlternativeTo
sites.notes: 添加产品到平台获取外链

sites.name: dev.to
sites.notes: 开发者社区,发布技术文章获取外链

sites.name: F6S
sites.notes: 初创企业平台,完善详细描述、创始团队、产品详情和网站链接

sites.name: There is an AI for that
Appscriber
sites.pricing: Paid — Get Featured Traffic Forever $49, Boost - 7 Days $99, Boost - 30 Days $199

sites.name: Find My AI Tool
sites.pricing: Paid — Basic Plan List Your Tool

sites.name: Aixploria
sites.pricing: Paid — Fast Listing $79, Verified Listing  $279, Featured $399

sites.name: Fazier
sites.pricing: Paid — Get featured in newsletter - $19 $39, Premium product - $39 $59, Submission to 50+ directories - $99 $149

sites.name: DoMore
sites.pricing: Paid — Pro Listing (lifetime) : $30, Pro Listing (lifetime) + Boost (14 days) : $70

sites.name: SaaS Surf
sites.pricing: Paid — $9 per month, $29 per month, $99 per month

sites.name: The AI Warehouse
sites.pricing: Paid — Standard Package: $450.00, Plus Package: $650.00, Premium Package: $750.00

sites.name: There's An AI For That
sites.notes: Major AI directory, may require payment

sites.name: AILib
sites.notes: Russian AI directory with English interface

sites.notes: Quality AI tools only, Tally form

BetaList

sites.name: SlideShare
sites.notes: 上传演示文稿,在描述中添加官网链接

sites.name: Clutch
sites.notes: B2B 评价平台,提交公司信息

sites.name: AI scout
sites.pricing: Paid — Submit Listing $50, Submit Premium Listing $300

sites.name: Capterra
